caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring an embroidered floral pattern around the neckline and a dark necklace. A small black lavalier microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom corners of each scene, a logo consisting of a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly across the frames. She maintains a consistent posture, facing forward toward the camera, while her gaze remains focused ahead. There are no other people, objects, or changes in the setting throughout the clip.
